# kCGImagePropertyTIFFDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Tagged Image File Format (TIFF).

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyTIFFDictionary: CFString
```

## Discussion

For more information about the available metadata keys, see [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/tiff-image-properties].
